creator: walraven@terantula.com
text:
pkg_add -r on RELENG_7 detects the wrong version pointing to the wrong location from where pkg_add wants to fetch. The location is packages-7-current which should be packages-7-stable.

Fix: 

It is fixed in RELENG_7_0; in /usr/src/usr.sbin/pkg_install/add/main.c as of revision 1.73
Also see ref to: http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=120291
How-To-Repeat: cvsup to RELENG_7 and run pkg_add -r
